system.description: You have a reputation as a terrifying enforcer; just looking at some folk is enough to get them to throw down their weapons. Your gaze functions as a weapon (Kill D6, ranged).It only works when your target can see you and if they have the capacity to be scared of you - so criminals are fair game, but heartsblood predators aren't. You can use this "weapon" in a haven or other landmark without causing a huge ruckus. Your gaze won't kill people - it's disheartening, and if you reduce an opponent's resistance to 0 with it they surrender, try to bargain their way out or trip and incapacitate themselves whilst fleeing.
